info.title: RingCentral Events API
info.description: The RingCentral Events External API provides programmatic access to manage organizations, events, sessions, stages, booths, registrations, tickets, magic links, reports, schedule items, tags, and data subscriptions. Authentication uses OAuth 2.0 with client credentials. API access is restricted to the Enterprise plan.
